# Sift Science in 2017: By the Numbers

With another year under our belts, we at Sift Science are counting our blessings – from amazing and supportive customers to an…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

Dec 11, 2017

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

With another year under our belts, we at Sift Science are counting our blessings – from amazing and supportive customers to an ever-growing team, we’re proud to share all that we’ve accomplished in the past 12 months. Did you check out our webinars? How many newsletters did you see? Have you implemented our Android SDK yet? Read on to learn more about all of the publications and iterations that we pushed in 2017!

## Countless new features and updates!

When our customers give feedback, we listen. The result? Many new features and updates to the Sift Science suite of solutions, ranging from Smart Collaboration Queues to mobile location data updates that make it easier to spot trends and stop fraudsters.

## 14 webinars

From insights into how our product  works, to partnerships with customers and industry experts, we’ve offered, recorded, and shared a wealth of webinars this year. And good news: you can check them out any time to get your burning questions answered!

## 12 new case studies

Joining the array of great brands already on the website, we posted 12 new case studies and video testimonials from customers across Europe, Asia, and the Americas. Marketplaces, ecommerce retailers, fintech startups, ticketing platforms, and online travel agencies…check! Some highlights: we helped Etix save $15,000 just 1 week into integration, while Patreon experienced a 95% reduction in fraud losses since starting with Sift Science. Learn more about how businesses use Sift Science to not only break up fraud rings but also keep good customers happy with some insights from folks on the front lines.

## 11 “Trust & Safety in Numbers” podcasts

Have you had a listen to our podcasts? Delve deep into the fascinating world of cybercrime, online trust, and new technologies with our biweekly Q&A-based episodes featuring everyone from notorious former hacker-turned-security-consultant Brett Johnson to LinkedIn’s Head of Trust & Safety, Paul Rockwell.  

## 6 products going strong

Our suite of products – powered by Live Machine Learning, our global trust network, and automation technologies – provides an incredible advantage for companies, regardless of industry or geography. Our newest offering, Account Takeover Prevention, is an innovative and much-needed solution in this age of seemingly endless data breaches.

## Events on 5 continents

North America, South America, Europe, Asia, and Australia: Sift Science participated in, hosted, or otherwise attended events across the world this year! We hosted a great gathering of customers in Brazil, gave a talk in Sydney, sponsored a travel conference in Bali, and hosted Architecting Trust & Safety Summits in NYC and San Francisco. Our Fraud Fighters Forums grew to Chicago and Los Angeles, and our activation at industry events deepend. In 2017, the Sift Scientists traveled the world and connected with folks across industries.

## 3 industry awards

In March, we started 2017 off right by snagging the Merchant Risk Council’s Technology Award for our innovative and effective machine learning approach. We followed up that win with the Judge’s Award for Best Overall Fraud/Security Solution at the CNP Expo in May. In November, we closed out the year with the People’s Choice Award at Phocuswright Launch Program.

## 2 Sift Science offices

We not only launched our 2nd office in Seattle, we also doubled in size this year! Sift Science grew from 65 to 130, with a particular focus on expanding our robust technical and business teams.

## 1 Digital Trust Platform

Our passion for putting our customers first sets Sift Science apart. Our commitment to trust and security has driven our development of the holistic Sift Science Digital Trust Platform, as well as our ongoing compliance with  (SOC) 2 Type 2 Certification and other data privacy practices.

After a productive 2017, we’re gearing up to crank out even more amazing features, produce even more enlightening content, and engage with even more incredible businesses worldwide. We love meeting partners and chatting with fraud folks, so drop us a line. Otherwise, keep an eye out for our exciting new offerings, and wishing you a very merry Sift-mas!
